name: Overnight Marinated Sweet and Sour Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut off and discard wing tips and excess skin.
2. Cut wings in half at the joint.
3. Place wings in an 8x8 inch baking dish.
4. Combine brown sugar, cider vinegar, soy sauce, and catsup in a small bowl.
5. Pour the marinade over the chicken wings, ensuring they are fully coated.
6. Marinate for 3 to 4 hours or overnight in the refrigerator, stirring once or twice to coat.
7. After marinating, microwave at high power for 11 to 22 minutes, or until a meat thermometer reads 165°F (74°C) and the wings are fork-tender. Check several times during cooking and stir the center portions to the outside of the dish after half the cooking time.
8. Makes approximately 15-20 wings.
